title: 50% off All Beverages
description: All hot and cold drinks at half price. Valid for dine-in only. Includes specialty coffees, teas, and cold brew.

title: iPhone Case Bundle — 3 for 1
description: Pick any 3 premium phone cases for the price of one. Covers all major brands.

title: End of Season — 40% Off
description: Selected styles from the spring collection at 40% off. In-store only.

title: Facial + Massage Combo
description: 60-minute facial paired with a 30-minute shoulder & neck massage by certified therapists.

title: Double Burger Wednesday
description: Every Wednesday: buy one double smash burger, get one free. Dine-in or takeaway.
